This account has been registered in another device.
Favourite dir is full, delete some and retry
Add Favourite Error, Favourite dir is full
Add Favourite Error, It has already added in favourite

Add movie or series to multi-screen
I have read and agreed to
This area limits watching the VOD.
Length limit must be between 1 and 13, since the Password including \'@\'
Password can only contain letters, numbers and _ , and length limit must be between 1 and 28.
This service will be available soon, please come back later.
It is a problem,please try again later.
Sorry, please buy the item through your set-top box.Setp 1:
Dear Subscriber! \n The balance of your personal account x.xx rub. \n Please make a payment to avoid blocking.
Please bind the STB account first.
Tv Alert add succeed,you\'ll be remind later.
sorry，please buy the item through your set-top box.
Are you sure to order this product?
Cancel the release to work hall
Are you sure to cancel order this product?
Sorry,only China Telecom 3G/5G network is supported
Failed to change the configure file, please try again.
Confirm Passwords do not match New Password
OTP code is incorrect, please input again.
Failed to get OTP code, please try again later.

Dear Client, Congratulations, your IPTV / VoD account has been successfully created! Please complete your registration by entering the confirmation code. Confirmation code: CODE Algeria Telecom thanks you for your loyalty.
Failed to update email address, please try again later.
Failed to update mobile number, please try again later.
The verification code have been sent to your Email address.
Please enter a valid email address
10 digit numbers from 0 to 9, start with 05,06 or 07.
Change order by drag right icon
Note: the numbers of subsequent channels in the list will increase by one
Face verification failed, please change anthother film
This is a restricted film. Please verify your identity
Viewing is currently limited to parental control settings !
Choose three magazine topics at most
Are you sure to clean all cache files?
Please click watch to play the movie
CloudDVR is not available due to unsubscribed
Do you want to delete the items?
Do you want to delete the item?
Do you want to delete the item ?
Do you want to delete the items ?
Your new password does not match
Confirm the release to work hall?
Congratulations on your completion of the question. You usually like watching action movies. The rest is very regular. Please keep it up
Please connect to STB with HC100 function
We have a problem, please try again later.
The current STB account has been bound to the mobile phone over 3,it can no longer bind a new mobile phone account!
The current STB account is not exist!
Could not play streaming at this time. Please try again later
The program is about to play.
The information of the credits is not available
The current network is cellular network
The content on your TV is not copyrighted by mobile phone.
personalized tags can not exceed 5 options
Please confirm that TV has the right to play the mobile phone screen program.

The application configuration does not support sharing, please look forward to it

Automatically resume caching after restarting APP
Automatically resume caching after switched to WIFI
You haven\'t installed \"weibo\" yet, do you want to download it?

click refresh button to reload data
Please enter the correct telephone or mailbox number
The episode has not been released yet, please try again later
Your account\'s balance has insufficient funds. You can replenish the balance using promised payment.
Your account cannot be served because of being in blacklist.
Error in get available biling method
Error in getting content from server
Error in getting tsel token. Please try again
Press the key again to exit the application
Are you sure want to exit?
Just choose the label from below.
You do not have a favorite tag yet,

You can describe the details of the scene that need feedback,such as what problems appear when playing a movie,or the description of the error message.\nIt\'s easy for us to better solve the program for you.
Dear %1$s，welcome login OTT！Your initial password is %2$s， Please click the icon which called My Account on the left to modify the password.
Do not want to use the float window playing, can be closed in the settings page oh!
Are you sure unbind STB account %s?
You hava been forbidden to comment.
To recover you password,check your email: %1$s and click the link to reset your password.
System will send the link to the following email address,please go to your email box and click the link which guide you to resent the password.
Couldn\'t get event detail. Please retry
Scan failed, can not get STB deviceID, please try again
Scan failed, can not get STB userID, please try again
Unable to get current location, please open GPS
can not get the real account
The next program has not been recorded yet.\n Go to live broadcast of the channel?
Pushed to the set-top box for playback
You maybe interest in these tags

In construction, please look forward to it !

Can\'t get interactive scenes on TV, please try again later!
Your network dose not have access to source permissions
sorry,this item is not available yet.
The Ivi function is not ordered,please order the related product package first.
The content has joined the caching sequence.
Please input your parental control password of the STB account
You scored xxx points in your last answer
Select categories that will be accessible without entering a password
The current content does not support playing on this device, please change another quality.
Sorry, the program cann\'t be played on current network.
Your password is incorrect, please input again
Content is not available. Inquiries by phone 123.
Are you sure confirm to Open Password ?
This PIN is used for parental controls to block channel,programs,video on demand,title and ratings,this PIN is also used to authorize Video on Demand and PPV Purchase.
The number of bound devices has reached the maximum. Please unbind device first.
Username and password can only contain letters, numbers and _
User name or password is incorrect.
Username or password is incorrect,please input again
Please login the system and continue.
You have to login to buy this item
You have not purchased this movie, please purchase first and cache the local.
The Megogo function is not ordered,please order the related product package first.
Sorry, the program is currently unable to play
Did not get the contents of the STB being played,please click Control TV video to try again
Please enter the serial number you want to move in!
%1$s movies can be added at most
You can only add up to five shadows
Please check the network connection and try again
The network connection failed. Please check the network setup.
You are not using a WiFi network,
continue to play will consume your mobile phone web flow
It is modified through phone number + SMS verification
No more than 15 Chinese and English, Numbers, _
Nickname is only allowed in both Chinese and English, Numbers and _
You have no any subscription at this time
No available related video at this time.
No content available. Please pull to refresh
There is no news for the time
Currently there is no ongoing event
You have not reserved any programs yet.
The program has no mobile rights, please push it to the TV side for playback.
You have not cached any programs yet.
You have not watched any programs yet.
You have not bound the set-top box
You have not making any Config Changes!
Sorry, the program does not support viewing on the phone
Please wait a moment, the video is being loaded.
To watch the program, use the device through which the recording was made.
NPVR is not available due to unsubscribed
You hava not ordered a channel.Add extra personal package office or contact to the sales service.
Now in offline mode, Please login to continue.
The original password was incorrectly typed
The online concurrency has \n reached the maximum.
You need to open the suspended play function in the system settings manually open system permissions.
the operation could not be completed
To receive the service, you need to change the service package. Inquiries by phone 123.
You can take (%1$d) minutes to see it, if you want to continue,please
Previewing, please buy to watch the full version
Sorry,system is busying,please try it later.
You haven\'t purchaseed the cont,please select one
Select and enter a payment method
Please call ALTIMA Telecom official to subscrib \n Telephone number 02510000
Parental guidance is compulsory for children under the age of 12
Subject to specified conditions and mature audiences only
Suitable for persons of age 15 and above
The password verification is correct. Continue to watch the video.
Password verification error, please try face verification.
The old and new passwords cannot be the same.
Verify that the password is incorrectly typed
Password can only contain letters, numbers and _
Passwords allow only letters, Numbers and _
The old password is same to the current.
The password must be four digits,please modify it!
pay in moblie account(the same month)
pay in moblie account:%1$s by monthly
pay in moblie account by monthly(if you want to unsubscribe ,sending tdads1xb to 10001 by SMS)
pay in moblie account by monthly(if you want to unsubscribe ,sending tdads1xb to 10001 by SMS)
network connect timeout, please try again.
The cost will be deducted from the user\'s phone number.
This function cannot be opened without this permission，please turn on this function:PERMISSION_ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION
This function cannot be opened without this permission，please turn on this function:PERMISSION_ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
This function cannot be opened without this permission，please turn on this function:PERMISSION_CALL_PHONE
This function cannot be opened without this permission，please turn on this function:PERMISSION_CAMERA
This function cannot be opened without this permission，please turn on this function:PERMISSION_GET_ACCOUNTS
This function cannot be opened without this permission，please turn on this function:PERMISSION_READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
This function cannot be opened without this permission，please turn on this function:PERMISSION_READ_PHONE_STATE
This function cannot be opened without this permission，please turn on this function:PERMISSION_RECORD_AUDIO
This function cannot be opened without this permission，please turn on this function:PERMISSION_WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
Permit 2G/3G network cache may lead to extra flow. Are you sure you want to continue?
The preview is over, please log in to continue to watch
Failed to play, please try again later.
Failed to play, please try again later.(%1$X).
Could not play video,please try again later.
After login, can enjoy the offline cache, favorites, bookmarks and other services
The number of devices allowed for simultaneous viewing of content has been exceeded.
Thrown to the TV to see
You are currently accessing the plathform outside ZALA
The next scheduled broadcast has started
This service will be available soon, please check back later.
Please delete it on the set-top box
You have not ordered any PPV products yet.
You have not ordered any PPV products yet.
You have not pay VIP,please immediately

Thank you for using the app. To help you use products and services safely, we may recycle your user information and device information after your authorization. Please read the Privacy Policy carefully before using it.
If you agree to this policy, please click \"Agree\" and start to use our services. We will do our best to protect your personal information.
unlimited duration and time in Membership period
* Cannot complete the New Profile without set password.\n Please set password
* The password is less than 4 numbers
Did not get the max number
The max number has been reached
you have no right to order
Block the title for all selected channels
You did not set the master login password,please set the password
* new password must be different from old one
Block title for all selected ratings
The password can not be empty
The profile has been logged in
The start time must be less than the end time.
Playback is available in the last hour h.
Are you sure to Open Password ?
Your purchase is expired. Please buy again.
This PIN is used to authorize Video on Demand and PPV Puchase.
Please push it to your TV to watch
Start the set-top box, enter home - iptv, enter the client download and bind page.
Click the scan button below, enter the QR Code scanning page, to find the QR Code Download the phone APP and bind the set-top box at the TV, complete scanning and binding.
on TV screen. Then, your smartphone or tablet will be paired with your set-top box.
You can use a smartphone or tablet for binding STB. After binding, you can easily use a mobile phone or tablet for interacting with TV , including remote control, push screen, etc.

To better learn about students\'life,learning,and social networking,the questionnaire network provides a series of students\' questionnaires,including those for pupils,middle school students,high school students,and college students. These questionnaires will provide important reference for the educational management,professional setting,and teaching adjustment of these schools.
Click on the star to rating
Display recharge succed,and svod new expire date is
The program is over,you could not add schedule.
Are you sure to cancel the schedule?
Do you want to cancel this series recording?
System busy, please try again later.
Date must be in 30 days,please select again.
The end time can\'t be earlier than current time,please select again.
Record duration must be at least 5 mins,please modify either start time or end time.
The end time can\'t be earlier than start time,please select again.
The start time can\'t be earlier than current time,please select again.
Recording is unavaliable for this programm
You have not recorded any programs yet.
Not recorded due to system not available at time recording
Not recorded due to a scheduling conflict
Not recorded due to a cancellation by a user
Not recorded due to a system error
Delete due to hard drive is full
Not recorded due to Set-top box exceeds capability limit
Not recorded due to lack of bandwidth
Not recorded due to Hard Drive is full
Sorry,can\'t get your balance infomation,please try it later.
No content available. Please click to refresh
You have registered successfully, welcome to experience OTT
Register successfully, continue to set the face infor
The program %s is about to start,do you want to watch it now?
Your alert has already reach the max number!
The program is about to start!
Do you want to add Live TV aleret?
Do you want to delete Live TV aleret?
Could not play this Live,Plase try again!
The remote control function is not ordered,please order the related product package first.
1.Start the set-top box, enter home - iptv, enter the client download and bind page.
2.Click the scan button above, enter the QR Code scanning page, to find the QR Code Download the phone APP and bind the set-top box at the TV, complete scanning and binding.
Please make sure the set-top box and phone are on the same network
The serial number you entered al-ready exists.Are you sure you want to replace it?
You need to Restart App to Apply Config Changes!
Please click Scan button on the top right corner, scan the QR code on the TV screen to log in.
Step1: Boot up your set-top box and go to the nmenu of QR2 code.
Step3: Choose which kind of app to share.
Step2: Click Scan button and begin to scan nQR2 code on TV screen.
Scan your set-top box, you can share.
Align QR code within frame to scan
Scan the login code on TV HomePage

Select the storage path for the cache files

Play success,if you want to exit TV playing?

SMS failed, please try again later!

would like to pair with your smartphone.
The storage is not enough. The file may not be completely cached.
The storage path is not exist. Please check the \"Storage path\" setting.
You are not subscribed to Children portal.Do you want to do it.
After switching the storage path, the previous caching content will still in the previous directory. Are you sure you want to continue?
Task Added Error, Please try again

the program is about to play.
